content.en:
After arriving at the True Spirit Realm, Ye Tian began to prepare for the cultivation in the future.

He has just broken through, and he still belongs to the early stage of the true spirit realm, if he wants to improve his cultivation, he will continue to refine the true spirit, and the true spirit shall prevail, if the true spirit reaches the middle stage of the true spirit, his cultivation will naturally be automatically promoted to the middle stage of the true spirit.

Ye Tian's true spirit is a chaotic true spirit, and it is difficult to improve, but every time he improves a little, he is much stronger than the other true spirits.

And the strength of the true spirit was enough to make Ye Tian's physical body tempering more thorough, but the fastest shortcut to improving the true spirit and cultivating was to cultivate the Chaos Body Alchemy Technique.

Originally, the creation of the Chaos Alchemy Technique was for the True Monarch of the True Spirit Realm, and later it slowly evolved into a simpler Chaos Alchemy Technique, which began to be used by the Heavenly Monarch, the Divine General, and the Earth Venerable.

"Now, I have stepped into the realm of true spirits, and the true spirit chapter of the Xuanxuan Jue can be cultivated. There are a total of nine layers of the True Spirit Chapter, and each level of advancement, the physical body will be twice as powerful, the first three layers belong to the early stage of the True Spirit Realm, the middle three layers belong to the middle stage of the True Spirit Realm, and the last three layers belong to the late stage of the True Spirit Realm. Once he has cultivated the ninth layer of the True Spirit Chapter of the Xuanxuan Technique, his physical body has almost reached the extreme of the True Spirit Realm, and his cultivation has also been raised to the peak level of the True Spirit Realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Because for him, every time the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter was upgraded by one level, his strength skyrocketed.

Of course.

The Xuan Xuan Jue True Spirit Chapter is also relatively difficult to cultivate, not that you can make rapid progress if you have enough resources, but that you need a certain amount of comprehension plus a lot of resources, and you also need to have enough potential.

For example, some True Monarchs with a poor physical foundation can only cultivate two or three layers of the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter at most.

However, even if there is no way to successfully cultivate the True Spirit Chapter, the cultivation can also be continuously improved, and only the True Spirit Realm needs to be improved, but in that case, the physical body is far less powerful than other True Monarchs, and that True Monarch is just a weak chicken.

For true spirits, improving the true spirit, refining the physical body, and improving the rudiments of the Great Dao are most of the cultivation contents.

Some weaker True Monarchs can also comprehend the Chaos Divine Power, or cultivate the more powerful Chaos Divine Power.

However, some geniuses have cultivated a Chaos Divine Power to the extreme level as early as the Heavenly Monarch level, and if they cultivate a few more Chaos Divine Powers, their strength will not increase much, unless they can create the Origin Divine Power.

But if the True Monarch level wants to create the Origin Divine Power, the difficulty is also extremely amazing.

Therefore, for many True Monarchs, what they want most is to condense a complete Great Dao, try to break through to the Great Dao realm, and become a True Ancestor.

But this step is too difficult!

Ye Tian learned that many True Monarchs in the Void Heaven Hall had already been promoted to the extreme, and they were just waiting to complete a complete avenue, but they had not succeeded so far.

There are even many True Monarchs' avenues that have been raised to 99,999 meters, and they are only one meter away to form a complete avenue, but one meter away is like a moat.

If there is no great perseverance, great chance, and great luck in this meter, there is no way to break through.

Even Longhai Zhenjun has been trapped in this step for at least tens of billions of years, and he has not been able to break through.

In the chaos, the number of True Monarchs is more than hundreds of millions, but the number of True Ancestors is not too much, just because of the prototype of the Great Dao.

When Ye Tian first learned the news, he was also extremely shocked.

At present, most of the powerhouses in the chaos who can break through to the True Ancestor realm rely on a large amount of time grinding.

If you can't break through in 10 billion years, it's 100 billion years, and if you can't break through in 100 billion years, then it will take 1 trillion years, and if it doesn't work, it will take 10 trillion years to break through.

After a long time, there are always a few lucky people who can break through.

That's all about perseverance and luck!

But in fact, there are two ways, one is to have a thorough insight into the essence of the Great Dao and have a transcendent understanding of the Great Dao, then you can break the shackles and condense a complete Great Dao.

And the major top forces have some supreme Taoist classics, telling the mysteries of various avenues, but in fact, the classics of each major force are not complete, some forces are proficient in the avenue of gold, and some sects are proficient in the avenue of water.

Even if it is the Void Heaven One Vein, there are only three Supreme Dao Canons, which represent the three Great Dao Paths.

If the cultivation happens to be these three great avenues, then you can use the Supreme Dao Code to take some time to try to break the shackles.

But if you are cultivating other avenues, then there is no way, you can only rely on another way, that is, to use some strange things to break through.

There are some rare strange things in the chaos that can help break the shackles, even if it is the shackles of the prototype of the Great Dao, it can also be broken, once you get that kind of strange thing, you can break through to the realm of the Great Dao and become a true ancestor.

However, this kind of strange thing is too rare, and once it appears, it will cause countless True Monarchs to snatch it.

Longhai Zhenjun has never obtained this kind of strange thing, and his cultivation is three kinds of avenues, namely the avenue of water, the avenue of power and the avenue of wind, with these three avenues to form his own Longhai avenue, and the void sky vein only has the supreme avenue of water, so Longhai Zhenjun has no way to break through the canon, he can only rely on time grinding or relying on strange things.

"My endless avenue is far beyond others, when the time comes, if you want to completely form a 100,000-meter avenue, I am afraid that the difficulty will far exceed that of others, even if my understanding is against the sky, I am afraid it will be extremely difficult, maybe I will be trapped in the true monarch for a long time!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Of course, all of this is not certain, if some strange things are born in the Quasi-Dao Realm, and they are strange things that can help him break through, wouldn't he be able to easily step into the True Ancestor Realm!

"Let's cultivate the Xuanxu Secret first!"

Ye Tian entered the retreat.

As the years passed, the rivalry of forces in the Quasi-Dao Realm gradually stabilized, and each major force was trying its best to develop its own true country, and the entire Quasi-Dao Realm ushered in an unprecedented prosperity.

In a flash, 10 million years have passed.

"Finally, the first layer of the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter has been successfully cultivated, the physical body has doubled, and the strength has skyrocketed!"

Ye Tian said happily.

But when I thought that there were nine layers of Xuanxuan Jue, and now I had only cultivated the first layer, and it had taken tens of millions of years and spent a lot of resources.

If he continued to cultivate, wouldn't the time it took be exaggerated?

"However, I am much faster than the others, even if the others enter the time-accelerated magic circle and have a huge amount of resources, but as far as I know, the disciples who can cultivate the first layer of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter will take at least a billion years!"

Ye Tian thought.

And most of the disciples of the Void Heaven First Vein completely gave up completely cultivating the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter at most three or four layers, because it was too difficult and too wasteful of time.

"It's still resources, the resources on my body are too low-level, in the time of the Heavenly Monarch, these resources were okay, but now that they have reached the level of the True Monarch, the effect of these resources is too poor. "

Ye Tian was ready to exchange for some high-level resources, otherwise this cultivation speed would be too slow.
